sizing_rule.note: Position size adjusted inversely by volatility (S and M parameters) with stretch/shrink factors; stretch factor (>1) increases size for optimistic outlook, shrink factor (<1) decreases size for pessimistic outlook. Specific factor values not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be adjusted based on two parameters: the standard deviation (S) and mean absolute deviation (M) of trades, with stretch and shrink factors to calibrate optimism or pessimism about future performance.
